title: Stelis bertoniensis
taxonomy: Stelis bertoniensis belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Stelis bertoniensis is classified as a genus Stelis, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids. The genus Stelis is further divided into several species, and Stelis bertoniensis is one of them. This orchid species is native to South America, specifically in the Misiones Province of Argentina and Paraguay. The classification of Stelis bertoniensis reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Orchidaceae family.
